diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,120 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, types exports
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point re-exporting all public APIs from Hono submodules
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports all public APIs - Hono class, Context class, HonoRequest type, and client types
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, Context, NotFoundResponse, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, RouterRoute, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, Context, Env, IntersectNonAnyTypes, IsAny, JSONValue, RemoveBlankRecord, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, MergePath, IfSchemaIsResponse, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, ToSchema, ResponseFormat
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Contains all core type definitions for Hono modules including types, handlers, middleware, and interfaces
+- Copy-safe detail: All type exports are compile-time only stable across versions
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, Router, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Hono class extends HonoBase with router initialization and default SmartRouter configuration
+- Copy-safe detail: Public API exports the Hono class with constructor accepting HonoOptions
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase class, compose, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, H, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MiddlewareHandler, BlankSchema, Env, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, FetchEventLike, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class with all HTTP method handlers, middleware support, error/not-found handlers, mounting capabilities, routing, and fetch/request methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Class methods are public API - get/post/put/delete/options/patch/all/on/use/route/basePath/onError/notFound/mount/fetch/request
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, ExecutionContext, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, PropsForRenderer, Layout, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, response methods (header, status, set, get, var, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound)
+- Internal names noticed: Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, Body, Data, ResponseHeader, DefaultRenderer, ResponseOrInit, ResponseHeadersInit, ResponseInit, COMPOSED_HANDLER, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/resolveCallback
+- Plain-English summary: The request context class providing access to variables, headers, request object, environment bindings, and response methods for creating HTTP responses
+- Copy-safe detail: Context class API and helper interfaces are public
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest
+- Internal names noticed: Body, BodyCache, GET_MATCH_RESULT, ValidationTargets, ParamKeys, ParamKeyToRecord, RemoveQuestion, Input, InputToDataByTarget, ParseBodyOptions, BodyData, Body, RequestHeader, CustomHeader, HTTPException, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode, HonoRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: The request object class with property accessors for getting parsed query params, path params, headers, body (JSON/text/formData), and URL/method
+- Copy-safe detail: Public class HonoRequest and cloneRawRequest utility function
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT (unique symbol)
+- Internal names noticed: None visible
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Contains a unique symbol for exposing match result property on HonoRequest
+- Copy-safe detail: Single symbol export stable across versions
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions
+- Internal names noticed: parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, BodyDataValueDot, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValue, ParseBodyOptions, BodyData
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request
+- Plain-English summary: Utilities for parsing form data and URL-encoded body into typed objects with dot notation and all-options support
+- Copy-safe detail: parseBody function and type exports are public API
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch, compose, Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition function based on koa-compose pattern, executing handlers in sequence with error and not-found handling
+- Copy-safe detail: Single compose function export taking middleware array, onError handler, and onNotFound handler
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions, HTTPException
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTPException extends Error to provide responses for authentication failures and other errors with status codes and optional response objects
+- Copy-safe detail: HTTPException class is public API for throwing HTTP errors with custom status codes and messages
+
+## src/utils/body.ts - ADDED (duplicate)
+
+## src/adapter/
